chatbot.title: AI Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: I'm here to help you
chatbot.welcomeMessage:
👋 **Hello!** I'm your AI assistant.

I can help you with:
- 📄 **Managing the resume library** (import, analysis, improvement)
- 🎯 **Creating missions** and adapting profiles
- ⚙️ **Using the features** of the application
- ❓ **Answering your questions**

How can I help you?
chatbot.errorMessage: Sorry, I couldn't process your request. Please try again.
